title: Release harness skeleton
objective: Create a Release Harness skeleton that checks release readiness, packages artifacts, and documents deployment steps without pushing to production by default.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Generate .harness/release/release-readiness.yml and docs/operations/release.md in Target Repos.
Define release gates for tests, build, migration notes, rollback plan, env checklist, and artifact availability.
Create a release package manifest without performing deployment by default.
Support a dry-run release command that prints required next actions.
Add tests for missing release gates and successful dry-run output.

expectedArtifacts: tests or fixtures when behavior changes
updated documentation if user-facing behavior changes
koObjective: 릴리즈 체크리스트, changelog, deploy 준비 skeleton을 만든다.

koGuide.요약: 이 작업은 Codex가 Dev Container 안에서 자동 구현할 수 있도록 설계된 단계별 task packet입니다.
